author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Committed. Updated comparison vs PyTorch:

| Operation         | PyTorch  | Before   | After    | vs PyTorch |
|-------------------|----------|----------|----------|------------|
| matmul [1024]     | 2,860us  | 2.1M us  | 33,011us | 11.5x      |
| MLP forward B=32  | 51us     | 3,320us  | 1,102us  | 21.5x      |
| MLP backward B=32 | 393us    | 8,348us  | 2,436us  | 6.2x       |
| Training step B=32| 535us    | 6,978us  | 2,770us  | 5.2x       |

Remaining gap is PyTorch's MKL matmul and fused ATen kernels. Pure Rust within 5-12x of heavily optimized C++/Fortran is strong.
